---
title: "SepsisHTE_DeIDCDW - Data Processing from CSV"
author: "Jean Digitale (Modified for CSV input)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

#Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
```

```{r Setup paths}
rm(list = ls())

# Set date and data name
today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
data_name <- paste0("HTESepsis_UCSFDeIDCDW_All_", today, ".RData")

# Input folder path - should match the folder created by extract_data.py
input_folder <- paste("Data_All_", today, sep = "")

# Check if input folder exists
if (!dir.exists(input_folder)) {
  stop(paste("Input folder not found:", input_folder,
             "\nPlease run extract_data.py first to download the data."))
}

# Output folder (same as input for now, or could be different)
output_folder <- input_folder

cat("Reading data from:", input_folder, "\n")
cat("Output will be saved to:", output_folder, "\n")
```

```{r Load lab and flowsheet IDs}
# Excel filepath
excel_filepath <- "Sepsis_R01_LabFlow_2023-11-29.xlsx"

# Get the names of all sheets in the Excel workbook
sheet_names <- excel_sheets(excel_filepath)
sheet_names_keys <- grep("keys", sheet_names, value=TRUE)

# Loop through each sheet and read it into a data frame
for (i in 1:length(sheet_names_keys)) {
  sheet_name <- sheet_names_keys[i]

  # Read the data
  temp_data <- read_excel(excel_filepath, sheet = sheet_name)

  # Assign the data frame to a variable named after the sheet
  assign(sheet_name, temp_data, envir = .GlobalEnv)

  # Delete temp data
  rm(temp_data)
}

lab_keys <- lab_keys %>%
  select(-Pull, -N)
```

```{r Load encounter keys}
# Load encounter keys from CSV (extracted by Python script)
cat("Loading encounter keys...\n")
enc_keys <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "enc_keys.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(enc_keys), "encounter keys\n")
```

```{r Load duration dim}
# Load duration dimension from CSV
cat("Loading duration dimension...\n")
dur <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "dur.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(dur), "duration records\n")
```

```{r Imaging data}
# Load imaging data from CSVs
cat("Loading imaging data...\n")
img_all_proc <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "img_all_proc.csv"))
img_lung_proc <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "img_lung_proc.csv"))
img_lung <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "img_lung.csv"))
cat("  Loaded img_all_proc:", nrow(img_all_proc), "rows\n")
cat("  Loaded img_lung_proc:", nrow(img_lung_proc), "rows\n")
cat("  Loaded img_lung:", nrow(img_lung), "rows\n")
```


```{r Load encounter data}
# Load encounter data from CSV
cat("Loading encounter data...\n")
enc <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "enc.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(enc), "encounter records\n")
```

```{r Load encounter data with primary diagnosis}
# There are some duplicate encounter keys because some diagnosis keys map onto more than one ICD10 code
cat("Loading encounter data with primary diagnosis...\n")
enc_dx <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "enc_dx.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(enc_dx), "encounter diagnosis records\n")
```

```{r Load patient keys}
# Load patient keys from CSV
cat("Loading patient keys...\n")
pt_keys <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "pt_keys.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(pt_keys), "patient keys\n")
```

```{r Load patient data}
# Load patient data from CSV
cat("Loading patient data...\n")
pt <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "pt.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(pt), "patient records\n")

# PatDurableDim contains only 1 record per patient - it filters out all the non-current and logically deleted records from PatientDim
# PatientDim may contain 1 or more records for each patient. To access historical values of patient's "type 2" data fields that were current eg at the time of a given Encounter, you should join the EncounterFact record with the PatientDim table based on PatientKey, not the DurableKey.
```

```{r Load ED data}
# Load ED visit data from CSV
cat("Loading ED visit data...\n")
ed <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "ed.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(ed), "ED visit records\n")

# EdDepartmentKey=43 is Parnassus, others are children's EDs
```

```{r Load hospital admission data}
# Load hospital admission data from CSV
cat("Loading hospital admission data...\n")
hosp_adm <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "hosp_adm.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(hosp_adm), "hospital admission records\n")
```

```{r Load ICU stay registry data}
# Load ICU stay registry data from CSV
cat("Loading ICU stay registry data...\n")
icu_reg <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "icu_reg.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(icu_reg), "ICU stay records\n")
```

```{r Load diagnosis events}
# Load all diagnosis events for selected encounters from CSV
cat("Loading diagnosis event data...\n")
dx_enc_icd <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "dx_enc_icd.csv"))

# DuckDB may return lowercase column names, so handle both cases
if ("patientdurablekey" %in% tolower(names(dx_enc_icd))) {
  # Find actual column names (case-insensitive)
  patient_durable_col <- names(dx_enc_icd)[tolower(names(dx_enc_icd)) == "patientdurablekey"]
  start_date_col <- names(dx_enc_icd)[tolower(names(dx_enc_icd)) == "startdatekeyvalue"]
  diagnosis_col <- names(dx_enc_icd)[tolower(names(dx_enc_icd)) == "diagnosiskey"]

  # Arrange using actual column names
  dx_enc_icd <- dx_enc_icd %>%
    arrange(.data[[patient_durable_col]], .data[[start_date_col]], .data[[diagnosis_col]])
} else {
  # Standard case - columns already properly cased
  dx_enc_icd <- dx_enc_icd %>%
    arrange(PatientDurableKey, StartDateKeyValue, DiagnosisKey)
}

cat("  Loaded", nrow(dx_enc_icd), "diagnosis event records\n")
```

```{r Load antibiotics}
# Load antibiotic medication data from CSV
cat("Loading antibiotic medications...\n")
med_ab <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "med_ab.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(med_ab), "antibiotic records\n")
```

```{r Load vasopressors}
# Vasopressors: Norepinephrine, Vasopressin, Epinephrine, Dobutamine,
# Milrinone, Phenylephrine, Dopamine
# Filtered to IV route only (done in extraction script)

cat("Loading vasopressor medications...\n")
med_vp <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "med_vp.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(med_vp), "vasopressor records\n")
```

```{r Load flowsheet data}
# Load flowsheet data from CSVs (already filtered by type in extraction script)
cat("Loading flowsheet data...\n")
flowsheet_assess <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "flowsheet_assess.csv"))
flowsheet_resp <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "flowsheet_resp.csv"))
cat("  Loaded flowsheet_assess:", nrow(flowsheet_assess), "rows\n")
cat("  Loaded flowsheet_resp:", nrow(flowsheet_resp), "rows\n")
```

```{r Load labs}
# Load lab data from CSV
cat("Loading lab data...\n")
labs <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "labs.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(labs), "lab records\n")
```

```{r Load death registry}
# Load death registry data from CSV
cat("Loading death registry data...\n")
death <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "death.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(death), "death records\n")
```

```{r Load insurance}
# Load insurance/coverage data from CSV
cat("Loading insurance data...\n")
insurance <- read.csv(file.path(input_folder, "insurance.csv"))
cat("  Loaded", nrow(insurance), "insurance records\n")

# PayorFinancialClass is the insurance variable to use per UCSF Business team
```

```{r Save processed data}
# List of data objects to keep
keep <- c("input_folder", "output_folder", "data_name", "enc_keys", "pt_keys",
          "pt", "enc", "enc_dx", "ed", "hosp_adm", "icu_reg", "dx_enc_icd",
          "med_ab", "med_vp", "flowsheet_assess", "flowsheet_resp", "labs",
          "death", "insurance", "dur", "img_all_proc", "img_lung_proc", "img_lung",
          "lab_keys", "flowsheet_row_keys")

# List all objects in the environment
all_objects <- ls()

# Identify which objects should be removed
remove <- setdiff(all_objects, keep)

# Remove temporary objects
rm(list = remove)

# Save R workspace
cat("\nSaving R workspace...\n")
save.image(file = file.path(output_folder, data_name))
cat("  Saved to:", file.path(output_folder, data_name), "\n")

cat("\nData processing complete!\n")
cat("All data loaded from:", input_folder, "\n")
cat("R workspace saved to:", file.path(output_folder, data_name), "\n")
```
